name: Maropost Identity – Login and Account Management in Neto
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Introducing Maropost Identity"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Identity refers to the unified login experience that comes in two parts \u2013 a unified login experience and access to the Identity portal."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Unified Login Experience"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first part is the "}, {"text": "all-access login experience", "bold": true}, {"text": " that provides you access to various Maropost products and services through Single Sign-On (SSO)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Some of its key features include:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Unified login experience that provides access to various Maropost products and services through a Single Sign-On (SSO)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A more secure and faster login experience"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ability to set up a single account that gives a user access across Maropost, saving time and making onboarding simpler"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supports social login (Sign in with Google, Sign in with Microsoft) and continues to support multi-factor authentication"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Identity Portal Access"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The second part is the "}, {"text": "Identity portal", "bold": true}, {"text": " that provides you with a single platform to manage your user profile and account security settings across multiple Maropost products."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Accessing Identity Portal"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can access the Identity portal directly at "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://id.maropost.com/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "https://id.maropost.com"}]}, {"text": ". To access the portal from your Neto control panel, click your username at the top-right corner, and select "}, {"text": "Manage account and password", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/5YM312Y630F2/accessingportal.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/5YM312Y630F2/accessingportal.png", "name": "AccessingPortal.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 137277, "width": 1054, "height": 1062, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 366, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:29:16+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "New User Sign Up"}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You can link your Neto account access to an existing Maropost Identity account even if the email address is different. The new email address will then be used as your login credential as well as for any communication from Maropost."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To sign up for a new Identity account, do the following:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log in to your Neto Control Panel using your current login credentials."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BR69WIOETQJJ/legacylogin.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BR69WIOETQJJ/legacylogin.jpg", "name": "LegacyLogin.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 615973, "width": 2560, "height": 1510, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 367, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:30:55+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Sign Up to Maropost Identity", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the banner."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3RKAXECSL5ZF/image-281-29.jpeg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/3RKAXECSL5ZF/image-281-29.jpeg", "name": "image (1).jpeg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 31616, "width": 782, "height": 290, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 368, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:34:18+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Read and agree to the consent message, and then click "}, {"text": "Okay", "bold": true}, {"text": " to proceed."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UQRUDX8LWMJN/confirmationprompt.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UQRUDX8LWMJN/confirmationprompt.png", "name": "ConfirmationPrompt.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 319402, "width": 1624, "height": 758, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 369, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:35:37+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the account creation page, the email, first name, and last name fields are pre-populated. You can update them as required. Enter the password you want to set for your account and click "}, {"text": "Sign Up", "bold": true}, {"text": ".\n"}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If you enter a different email address than the existing one, your email address will be updated to the new one."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NIPNPK3IC4RU/signup.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/NIPNPK3IC4RU/signup.jpg", "name": "SignUp.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 750792, "width": 1852, "height": 1900, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 372, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:37:05+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll be redirected to set up multi-factor Authentication (MFA). To learn about MFA, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1016-multi-factor-authentication-in-neto", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Factor Authentication in Neto"}]}, {"text": ".\n"}, {"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Remember to save your recovery codes."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/JLZ248GX332R/signup-mfa.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/JLZ248GX332R/signup-mfa.jpg", "name": "SignUp_MFA.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 729214, "width": 1876, "height": 1567, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 371, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:36:45+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You\u2019ll see a confirmation message indicating successful account creation. Click "}, {"text": "Done", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Log in to Neto with Identity Account Credentials"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the steps below to log in with your Maropost Identity credentials:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the Login page, enter your Maropost Identity credentials, which include your registered email address and password."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SVD9YXHVX8UN/login-page.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SVD9YXHVX8UN/login-page.jpg", "name": "Login Page.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 421280, "width": 1484, "height": 1449, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 373, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:39:14+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Remember Me", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox to maintain your user session. When selected, it allows you to skip entering Maropost Identity credentials and OTP for up to 30 days, except in the case of manual sign-out."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click Login. You\u2019ll be redirected to the Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) page. To learn about setting up MFA, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1016-multi-factor-authentication-in-neto", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Factor Authentication in Neto"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/M0DIW89WXPO6/mfalogin.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/M0DIW89WXPO6/mfalogin.png", "name": "MFALogin.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 100753, "width": 856, "height": 964, "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "mediaID": 374, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:44:01+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Here, enter the six-digit One-Time Password (OTP) from your mobile authenticator app and then click "}, {"text": "Login", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On successful authentication, you\u2019ll be redirected to Neto."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": You can also use a passkey, which is a secure passwordless option, to log in without the need for a password or authentication OTPs. To learn how you can set up and use passkeys, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2260-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-windows", "children": [{"text": "Passkeys for Neto Login on Windows"}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2261-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-macos", "children": [{"text": "Passkeys for Neto Login on macOS"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Manage Account Settings on Identity Portal"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The identity portal acts as a centralized location where you can update your user profile information and configure your account security settings."}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Managing Your User Profile"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "User Profile", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0section, you can update your profile information, such as your first and last name, company name, and phone number."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DYBWQOQGPD91/identity-profile.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DYBWQOQGPD91/identity-profile.jpg", "name": "Identity-Profile.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 263113, "width": 2560, "height": 1192, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 375, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:45:42+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Managing Your Account Security Options"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Security", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, you can set up and update your login password, MFA (OPT setup and recovery codes, and passkeys."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0LTH6WNB1NT7/identity-security.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0LTH6WNB1NT7/identity-security.jpg", "name": "Identity-Security.jpg", "type": "image/jpeg", "size": 796753, "width": 2560, "height": 2688, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 376, "dateInserted": "2025-07-29T18:47:52+00:00", "insertUserID": 5460, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "5460", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Categorized as three sections, the Security page contains the following:"}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Basic Authentication"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this section, you can reset your password."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Two-Factor Authentication"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this section, you can reconfigure your MFA setup. It includes the following options:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "OTP", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Enables you to reconfigure your MFA setup by replacing the existing OTP method with a new one."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Recovery Codes", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Enables you to generate a new set of recovery codes if you have misplaced the existing recovery codes. Note that recovery codes are generated during MFA setup and can be used in cases where you cannot use your authenticator apps or aren\u2019t receiving any OTP."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn about MFA, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1016-multi-factor-authentication-in-neto", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Multi-Factor Authentication in Neto"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Passwordless"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this section, you can set up and manage your passkeys. Passkey is a secure login option without the need for a password or authentication OTPs. Here, the system prompts you to sign in with a passkey either via your main device, a smartphone or tablet, or with the help of a USB security key."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn about passkeys, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2260-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-windows", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Passkeys for Neto Login on Windows"}]}, {"text": " and "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2261-passkeys-for-neto-login-on-macos", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Passkeys for Neto Login on macOS"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}]
